name: Jake "Razor" Clawson || SWAT Kats
description:
SWAT Kats is a show from the early 1990s about two kats that are vigilantes that fight crime and live their lives by their rules.

Jake's code name is Razor and is the weapons specialist within the duo. Typically he is more of the brainy one compared to his partner Chance.
creator: Snowdragoninlife
